features.name: vpi_iterate(vpiRange) on multi-dimensional array
features.description: Code should include a multi-dimensional array declaration that is accessed via VPI using vpi_iterate(vpiRange, ...) to iterate over array ranges

features.name: vpi_handle(vpiLeftRange) on vpiRange object
features.description: Code should include VPI code that calls vpi_handle(vpiLeftRange, range_h) on a vpiRange object obtained from vpi_iterate(vpiRange, ...)
